name: New American Funding - Amanda Cooper
description_short: Amanda Cooper is a Branch Manager at New American Funding in Fort Worth, TX, offering mortgage loans for home purchases, refinancing, and down payment assistance programs.
description_long:
Amanda Cooper (NMLS #1102668) is a Branch Manager at New American Funding, a mortgage lender operating in the Fort Worth, Texas area. She serves as a local loan officer helping borrowers navigate the home financing process with personalized support and guidance.

New American Funding offers traditional mortgage products including home purchase loans, refinancing options, and specialized programs like the Pathway to Homeownership Initiative, which provides up to $6,000 in non-repayable down payment assistance to qualified first-time homebuyers in select areas. The company also offers NAF Cash, a program enabling borrowers to make competitive cash offers without contingent financing and close in as little as seven days. The branch provides mortgage calculators for estimates, refinance scenarios, affordability assessments, and amortization schedules.

Amanda Cooper's branch distinguishes itself through strong customer ratings—4.97 out of 5 stars based on 117 reviews—with clients specifically praising streamlined processes, transparent communication, and attentive service. The company emphasizes its NAF360 initiative, which it describes as "360 degrees of trust and respect," and offers NAF Connect, a platform designed for real estate professionals to track loan status and collaborate with loan officers in real time.

As a branch manager for a larger lending network, Amanda Cooper provides access to institutional mortgage products and programs, though borrowers should understand that mortgage lending involves lengthy underwriting processes, credit verification, and property appraisals. The company's emphasis on down payment assistance and cash-offer programs caters to specific borrower profiles but may not address all financing scenarios or offer the most competitive rates for all credit profiles.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: High customer satisfaction with 4.97/5 rating across 117 reviews on the profile
Pathway to Homeownership Initiative provides up to $6,000 in non-repayable down payment assistance for first-time homebuyers
NAF Cash program allows borrowers to make cash offers and close in as little as seven days without selling current home first
Multiple mortgage calculators available (payment estimation, affordability, refinance, amortization schedules)
NAF Connect platform gives real estate agents real-time loan status updates and co-branded marketing materials
Amanda Cooper has direct contact information (817-689-2987) and email (amanda.cooper@nafinc.com) for personalized service
Clients report streamlined processes and transparent communication throughout the mortgage process
cons: As a branch manager at a large lender, product offerings and rates may be limited compared to shopping multiple lenders
Down payment assistance program only available in select areas—geographic limitations not specified on profile
No information provided about credit score requirements, loan terms, interest rates, or closing costs
NAF Cash program involves 7-day closing timelines which may not suit all borrowers' situations
Profile lacks details on FHA, VA, USDA, or other specialized loan program availability
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Fort Worth, Texas area seeking down payment assistance and streamlined mortgage processes
Homeowners considering refinancing to lower payments or eliminate mortgage insurance
Real estate agents in Texas looking for a lender partner with transparent collaboration tools and real-time updates
Buyers interested in making competitive cash offers without contingent financing
diagnosis: Amanda Cooper is best suited for Texas homebuyers and refinancers seeking straightforward mortgage products with strong customer service and down payment assistance eligibility. The main caveat is that as a single branch manager at a larger lender, rate shopping with competitors and understanding program eligibility requirements (especially geographic limitations on assistance programs) should occur before committing.
services: Pathway to Homeownership Initiative (up to $6,000 down payment assistance for first-time buyers)
NAF Cash program (cash offer capability with 7-day closing)
NAF Connect platform for real estate professionals
Co-branded marketing materials for real estate agents
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
